flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Polaris Career Center fell 83% between 2006 and 2009 (100.0% → 16.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Polaris Career Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (85.7% vs 97.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Polaris Career Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Polaris Career Center rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (225 → 300).
